title: West of the Pecos
writer: Zane Grey, Milton Krims, John Twist
actors: Richard Dix, Martha Sleeper, Samuel S. Hinds
plot: After the Civil War, Colonel Lambeth returns to his country home in Georgia and is reunited with his daughter Terrill. Broke and with no immediate prospects, Lambeth and Terrill decide to sell their property and go West together t...
